title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_layers.py (第 321 至 648 行，共 648 行) ---
 321 | 
 322 |                         # 更新倒排索引
 323 |                         keywords = self._extract_keywords(data)
 324 |                         for keyword in keywords:
 325 |                             if keyword not in self.inverted_index:
 326 |                                 self.inverted_index[keyword] = []
 327 |                             if session_id not in self.inverted_index[keyword]:
 328 |                                 self.inverted_index[keyword].append(session_id)
 329 |             except Exception as e:
 330 |                 print(f"⚠️ 重建索引时跳过文件 {summary_file}: {e}")
 331 | 
 332 |         # 遍历所有 MemoryItem 文件
 333 |         for item_file in self.storage_dir.glob("memory_item_*.json"):
 334 |             try:
 335 |                 with open(item_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 336 |                     data = json.load(f)
 337 |                     item_id = data.get("id")
 338 |                     if item_id:
 339 |                         self.item_index[item_id] = item_file
 340 | 
 341 |                         keywords = self._extract_item_keywords(data)
 342 |                         for keyword in keywords:
 343 |                             if keyword not in self.item_inverted_index:
 344 |                                 self.item_inverted_index[keyword] = []
 345 |                             if item_id not in self.item_inverted_index[keyword]:
 346 |                                 self.item_inverted_index[keyword].append(item_id)
 347 |             except Exception as e:
 348 |                 print(f"⚠️ 重建 MemoryItem 索引时跳过文件 {item_file}: {e}")
 349 | 
 350 |         # 保存索引
 351 |         self._save_index()
 352 | 
 353 |     def _extract_keywords(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[str]:
 354 |         """从摘要数据中提取关键词"""
 355 |         keywords = []
 356 | 
 357 |         # 从摘要文本中提取
 358 |         summary_text = data.get("summary_text", "")
 359 |         keywords.extend(self._tokenize(summary_text))
 360 | 
 361 |         # 从任务目标中提取
 362 |         task_goal = data.get("task_goal", "")
 363 |         keywords.extend(self._tokenize(task_goal))
 364 | 
 365 |         # 从文件路径中提取
 366 |         files_changed = data.get("files_changed", [])
 367 |         for fc in files_changed:
 368 |             if not isinstance(fc, dict):
 369 |                 continue
 370 |             # FileChange 当前规范字段是 path；兼容旧数据中可能存在的 file_path
 371 |             file_path = fc.get("path") or fc.get("file_path", "")
 372 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(file_path))
 373 | 
 374 |         return list(set(keywords))
 375 | 
 376 |     def _extract_item_keywords(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[str]:
 377 |         """从 MemoryItem 数据中提取关键词。"""
 378 |         keywords = []
 379 | 
 380 |         for field_name in ("kind", "type", "title", "content", "project", "status"):
 381 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(data.get(field_name, ""))))
 382 | 
 383 |         for concept in data.get("concepts", []):
 384 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(concept)))
 385 | 
 386 |         for file_path in data.get("files", []):
 387 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(file_path)))
 388 | 
 389 |         for session_id in data.get("source_session_ids", []):
 390 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(session_id)))
 391 | 
 392 |         return list(set(keywords))
 393 | 
 394 |     def _tokenize(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
 395 |         """简单分词（支持中英文）"""
 396 |         import re
 397 | 
 398 |         # 英文/路径片段：保留下划线文件名（如 memory_layers），同时拆分为普通英文词
 399 |         raw_words = re.findall(r'\b[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]{1,}\b', text.lower())
 400 |         words = []
 401 |         for word in raw_words:
 402 |             words.append(word)
 403 |             words.extend(part for part in word.split('_') if len(part) >= 2)
 404 | 
 405 |         # 中文分词（简单实现：提取 2-3 字的片段）
 406 |         # 注意：这是简化版本，实际应用中应使用 jieba...
